programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: A new marriage changes the balance and opens an even more dangerous front. As secrets come to light, tensions rise and a hidden threat puts everyone at risk.

programme.title: The Legacy of the Enchanted Veil
programme.desc: Tracy is the last of the three friends to keep her old wedding veil. Will he also have a magical effect on her, despite her skepticism?

programme.title: Coyote Bar
programme.desc: Upon moving to New York with the aim of becoming a famous songwriter, Violet is left in complete despair and penniless. Shy and innocent, she ends up getting a job as one of the bartenders at the hottest bar in town: the small, wild and fun Coyote Bar.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Forty-year-old and single again, Bridget Jones focuses on work. But after meeting Jack, a dashing American, Bridget is surprised by a...pregnancy! The problem is that she is only 50% sure of the identity of the baby's father.

programme.title: Brilliant Mind
programme.desc: Frank is a single man who raises his 7-year-old niece Mary, a gifted girl who he wants to give a normal life. But when the girl's grandmother realizes her granddaughter's capabilities, she makes other plans for her that could separate Frank and Mary.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN REGULUS CAVE. A murder case rocks a small town when Julien Monnier is found stabbed near the Régulus troglodyte caves. Next to him, an ancient book is discovered.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER AT CONCARNEAU. In Concarneau, the body of a local shipowner, Gidas Quéméneur, is found floating in the canal. Gabriel Rivière, captain of the PJ, is sent to collaborate with Magali Morvan, chief of the municipal police.

programme.title: Fallen Angels Club: Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Ex-convict and aspiring lawyer Hollis Morgan becomes the target of police investigation when a member of her book club is found murdered.

programme.title: An English Estate
programme.desc: Los Angeles. Promising architect Nora Cartwright's life is about to change. First, she realizes that both her boyfriend Daniel and she are too engaged in their respective careers to be available for a relationship and ends up breaking up.

programme.title: A Taste of Death: A Mystery by Hannah Swensen
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Hannah Swensen when her mother, Delores, finds the lifeless body of a homeowner—a regular customer at The Cookie Jar—while searching for a home for her sister Michelle.

programme.title: A Taste of Death: A Mystery by Hannah Swensen
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Hannah Swensen when her mother, Delores, finds the lifeless body of a homeowner—a regular customer at The Cookie Jar—while searching for a home for her sister Michelle.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget, a 32-year-old Londoner, decides that the time has come to change her life. Over the next 12 months you will have to lose weight, stop smoking and drinking, find a “handsome and sensitive” fiancé and change jobs. During the process, he writes everything down in a diary...

programme.title: Diabolic Pursuit
programme.desc: A college student finds himself caught up in a web of industrial espionage, government intrigue and murder as he works on a groundbreaking scientific project.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Recent decisions continue to generate tension and divide the family. As old conflicts resurface, unexpected encounters fuel feelings and further complicate the situation.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: A new marriage changes the balance and opens an even more dangerous front. As secrets come to light, tensions rise and a hidden threat puts everyone at risk.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: New alliances begin to move key pieces and trigger suspicions. As secrets and manipulations increase, a hidden plan threatens to permanently disrupt the balance.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Luciano refuses Umberto's job offer, but Silvia does not accept her husband's decision and decides to resolve the problem on her own.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Adelaide begins to feel threatened by the growing intimacy between Marta and Luca.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Salvatore decides to show up for the fight in Antonio's place. Meanwhile, Riccardo's riding successes offer Luca a new opportunity to take revenge on the Guarnieri.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Onur and Lale meet due to a misunderstanding. After a night of madness, Onur and Lale wake up in the morning with no memory of what happened the night before. Little by little they try to put the pieces together to see if they can understand the confusion.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Lale doesn't remember who got her pregnant. The family tries to discover the father's identity. Finally, she remembers Onur.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: In the morning, Lale and Onur go to the hospital with their respective mothers to take a DNA test. Onur is actually the baby's father, and the final decision belongs to Ismet: Lale and Onur must marry.

programme.title: Poisoned Love: The Stacey Castor Story
programme.desc: Stacey Ruth Castor has overcome the death of her first husband and managed to find love again with her boss, David. But when David is found dead in an apparent suicide, the police suspect foul play.

programme.title: On the Edge of 18
programme.desc: Growing up is not easy for some. For Nadine, for example, a student who has to deal with the fact that her best friend is dating her older brother. She feels more alone than ever... Until she meets a young man who gives her all his attention...

programme.title: My Girlfriend Has Amnesia
programme.desc: Henry Roth lives in a Hawaiian paradise, in the company of beautiful women, without commitments. That is, of course, until he met Lucy Whitmore! But Lucy suffers from short-term memory loss and Henry will have to fight to get her to recognize him...

programme.title: Dressed for Wedding
programme.desc: Jane is a romantic and independent woman who has been a bridesmaid 27 times! Her fairy tale seems far from coming true, until her little sister wins the heart of Jane's boss, with whom she is secretly in love.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN LIMOGES. In Limoges, the porcelain capital of the world, a murder shocks the Langedamont company: Antony Delcourt, an experienced worker, is found stabbed with a porcelain stiletto.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN GUADELOUPE. When Christian Rivière, a well-known businessman, is found dead, Jean-Baptiste Lonteau, a former police officer and white reservist, returns to duty and leads the investigation with Lieutenant Télumée Magloire, who has just returned to Guadeloupe.

programme.title: Couple of the Year
programme.desc: After separating, a Hollywood couple still has to keep up appearances to promote the film they made together. To stop things from falling apart, the film's publicist tries to divert attention with a story that everything is fine between them...

programme.title: Bridget Jones's New Diary
programme.sub-title: Bridget, a clumsy and complex journalist, suspects the infidelity of her partner with whom she has been in a relationship for just
programme.desc: Finally, Bridget found love with Mark, who is caring and dedicated. But Bridget can't help but feel jealous when Mark has a stunning new intern. To complicate matters, Daniel, the former boss, is returning...

programme.title: This house is a ruin
programme.desc: Anna (Shelley Long) is a young and attractive violinist who stays for a few days with her boyfriend, the lawyer Walter Fielding (Tom Hanks), in the luxurious apartment of her ex-husband, the great conductor Max Beissart (Alexander Godunov). They are happy, but they want to be even more so. Walter's formula is very simple, happiness is in a little house on the outskirts of New York with its white fence, a dog, two children and a little woman. But, at least for the moment, Anna's intentions do not involve marriage. However, the urgent need to look for a house is imposed when her ex-husband returns suddenly and needs to reoccupy her apartment. Walter turns to his friend Jack (Josh Mostel), a real estate agent, who provides him with a real bargain a few kilometers from New York, a dream house for very little money. After managing to raise the money, the couple buys the house from Estelle, its quirky owner (Maureen Stapleton). But unfortunately, mishaps begin to happen in this fabulous mansion: doorbells burn, the bed sinks, the door falls, steps break, ceilings fall apart, pipes shake and, as the final number, the staircase shatters. But since they still really like the house, with the best of their will they set out to fix the mess. They turn to the service of the unique Shirk brothers, Art (Joe Mantegna), the carpenter, and Brad (Carmine Caridi), the plumber.

programme.title: Together and mixed up
programme.desc: Jim and Lauren have a disastrous blind date and decide not to see each other again. Together with their respective children, the unique couple separately books an idyllic vacation at a luxurious resort dedicated to safaris in Africa. Without knowing they were going to meet, Lauren and Jim end up spending more time together than they imagined.

programme.title: Happiness never comes alone
programme.desc: Sacha is a true seducer who loves to go out, he ignores alarm clocks, engagement rings and taxes. Charlotte is a modern, independent woman who has three children, two ex-husbands, and runs a contemporary art foundation. There is no place for romance in his life. Although they are polar opposites, when they meet, they discover that they are made for each other.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Running at full speed around the track, doing everything around, over and through the competition. Speed ​​Racer is a born racer, born to drive racing cars. Speed ​​is aggressive, instinctive and, above all, reckless. His only competition is the memory of his brother, his idol, the legendary Rex Racer, whose death in a race has left a goal that Speed ​​feels the need to fulfill. Speed ​​feels a great loyalty to the family racing business run by his father, Pops Racer, the designer of the powerful Mach 5 car he pilots. When Speed ​​rejects a very lucrative and tempting offer from Royalton Industries, he not only angers the company's maniacal owner but also discovers a terrible secret: some of the most important races are being manipulated by a handful of heartless businessmen who manipulate the most important drivers to get more money. If Speed ​​does not drive for Royalton's team, Royalton will ensure that the Mach 5 never crosses the finish line. The only way Speed ​​can save his family's business and the sport he loves is to beat Royalton at its own game. With the support of his family and his loyal girlfriend, Trixie, Speed ​​teams up with his former rival, the mysterious Racer X, to win the race that killed his brother: the death-defying cross-country rally.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish is a boy who accidentally finds a board game called Jumanji and convinces his friend Sarah to try it, but very strange events begin to occur and the game will catch them and change their lives. By throwing the dice, Alan is transported to a parallel world, where he will not be able to leave until the game ends, but circumstances cause Sarah to leave and Alan is trapped for 26 years in that other world until two new children find the game and start playing.

programme.title: my sister's husband
programme.desc: Richard is a Cambridge professor who will find himself involved in an unexpected love triangle. After getting a young and attractive American student pregnant, he will also meet her sister, an eccentric novelist.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea of ​​robbing a bank to get a mob boss out. However, the plan turns out to be exceedingly satisfactory when they get much more money than anticipated and, in addition, Trench's forces do not block their exit. To complicate things a little more. Stigman turns out to be a Navy Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes all the money. Soon, a confusing loop will begin in which both forces of the American army will pursue both Trench and Sitgman in a corrupt and dirty plot to each keep the profits. And without anyone expecting it, both Trench and Sitgman discover that they have to work together to be able to survive their own bosses and assault groups and to finally emerge victorious. During the development of the film, Vince Vaughn was going to play Bobby and Owen Wilson was going to play Stig. Also, as a curiosity, in the film's trailer you can hear the song "Die by the drop" from 2010 by the band The Dead Weathers. This song had previously been used in the trailer for Contraband (2012), which also featured Mark Wahlberg and was directed by Baltasar Kormákur.

programme.title: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: When a Russian satellite in orbit around Earth threatens to fall onto the planet, NASA looks to the engineer who designed it to fix it before it enters the atmosphere. Frank Colvin, a former Air Force pilot, was the one who designed the device forty years ago. He was about to travel to space but they finally decided to do without him, truncating all his dreams of being an astronaut. Reluctantly, Frank accepts the mission to travel to space, but on the condition that his team, the one from forty years ago, accompany him on the mission. After some grueling tests, Frank Colvin, Tank Sullica, Jerry O'Neil and Haw Hawkins travel into space to fix the satellite. But when they reach the point where they must carry out their mission, they encounter some more difficult problems than expected. In the film, the four astronauts appear together on 'The Tonight Show with Jay Leno.' To promote the film, the four actors also went to this program. NASA offered the production its 'vomit comet' plane, used to create the state of weightlessness. Clint Eastwood rejected the offer for fear that the elderly actors would become too ill to work. The four actors pretend to be the same age in the film, seventy years old. In reality, the youngest is Tommy Lee Jones, who at the time of filming was only fifty-four years old.

programme.title: Shark week
programme.desc: Shark experts return to Plettenberg, South Africa, with new technology: a seal-shaped decoy to study and capture the dramatic battles between sharks and seals.

programme.title: Adoptive parents
programme.desc: Coline and André are in perfect harmony with their daughter, Garance, and their son-in-law Harold. But Garance separates from Harold and orders his parents to never see him again, the in-laws cannot do it. They will have to lead a double life to continue seeing their beloved son-in-law.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: force team
programme.desc: With the American football league very advanced and the possibility of reaching the finals, the Washington Sentinels players decide to go on strike. To solve such a delicate situation, the team owner hires legendary coach Jimmy McGinty and proposes an almost impossible challenge: recruit a team of substitutes in one week. Once the first step is taken, you will have to face an even more difficult mission; coach this peculiar group of unknown and somewhat "losing" players, led by Shane Falco.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: In 1970, the Apollo 13 spacecraft makes one of many routine trips through space towards the Moon. Astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert, who were supposed to fly on Apollo 14, are relegated to this mission that is unimportant in popular opinion. Everything changes when the ship is already outside the Earth, heading towards the Moon, and an explosion inside the space module threatens the entire crew. This is the mission that made famous the phrase 'Houston, we have a problem' and tells the story of how the astronauts did everything possible to survive, at the same time that, from Earth, NASA workers tried to plan a strategy to bring their men back home. To achieve true weightlessness, the cast and crew flew in NASA's KC-135 plane, nicknamed 'The Vomit Comet.' Some of the scenes in which the Earth can be seen from the windows of Apollo 13, the images of the planet are photographs taken by astronauts Jim Lovell and Bill Anders on the Apollo 8 mission. In the original recording of the real Apollo 13 mission, the phrase Lovell pronounces is not 'Houston, we have a problem', but rather 'Ahh, Houston, we have had a problem.' According to the director, Ron Howard, that phrase indicated that the problem had already passed, so he decided to change it to the present, so that the tension would not decrease. Actor Brad Pitt had the opportunity to participate in this film, but he turned down the job to play the protagonist of 'Seven'.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Two years ago Peter Parker decided to accept his responsibility as Spider-Man and put his personal life aside; within which enter his great love Mary Jane Watson and his friend Harry Osborn, who feels a desire for revenge against Spider-Man for the death of his father. Peter's relationship with both of them is increasingly deteriorating. Peter's friend and role model, Dr. Otto Octavius ​​begins experimenting with fusion energy funded by the current president of Oscorp, who is Harry Osborn. But accidentally, the experiment becomes unstable, so his robotic arms fuse to his spine and he loses control, becoming the villainous Dr. Octopus. Despite this conflict with Octavius, Peter faces the emotional distress caused by knowing that his love Mary Jane is engaged to another man. This makes him think about what his life would be like without having to fight crime, so he will be forced to choose between his personal life as a student and his public obligations. Directed by Sam Raimi, it is the second film in the Marvel superhero saga made by this director, who is also known for his low-budget horror films such as "The Evil Dead" trilogy. He also produced television series such as "Hercules: His Legendary Journeys" or "Xena: Warrior Princess." Tobey Maguire plays Peter Parker in this first Spider-Man trilogy, who made his film debut with "This Boy's Life" and starred in films such as "Pleasantville", "Seabiscuit" and "The Great Gatsby". Kirsten Dunst plays Mary Jane Watson. This actress, model and singer was recognized at the age of 12 for her portrayal of a vampire in "Interview with the Vampire." He also participated in "Jumanji", "The Virgin Suicides" by Sofia Coppola and "Marie Antoinette". James Franco plays Harry Osborn, who began in the series "Freaks & Geeks" and participated in films such as "Milk" or "127 Hours."

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Point Break (Sin límites)
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'They Call Him Bodhi', directed in 1991 by Kathryn Bigelow ('The Darkest Night'). Johnny, a young FBI agent, infiltrates a team of elite athletes led by Boshi. Johnny's mission is to discover if the gang is behind a series of deaths and unusual robberies that are causing the world economy to plummet. Therefore, covertly and trying not to discover his true identity, the agent will have to risk his life to find evidence that will allow him to incriminate the gang and capture it. However, when he begins to form a friendship with the leader, Johnny will question whose side he is on and what he should do.

Charlotte is a modern, independent woman who has three children, two ex-husbands, and runs a contemporary art foundation. There is no place for romance in his life. Although they are polar opposites, when they meet, they discover that they are made for each other.

programme.title: run like a girl
programme.desc: The true story of Michelle Payne, the first female jockey to win the Melbourne Cup. An inspiring story of effort, family, friendship and courage in the face of the impossible.

programme.title: hidden figures
programme.desc: As a child, African-American Katherine proved to be a mathematical prodigy. Now, as an adult, she works for NASA... but in the USA of 1961, as a woman and black, her brilliant work means very little.

programme.title: When the river rises
programme.desc: The story takes place in Tennessee. Despite the threat of a rising river and a poor harvest, Tom Garvey and his wife Mae, a young farming couple, are determined to preserve the land of their ancestors. But, burdened by debt, Tom is forced to become a scab during a strike at the local steel mill, leaving his wife to run the farm. Upon their return, they have to face not only the flooding of a furious river that can wash away the work of so many years but also a power-hungry landowner who covets the lands of the Garveys and their neighbors to satisfy his ambition.

programme.title: No reservations
programme.desc: Kate Armstrong is a brilliant and demanding haute cuisine chef in charge of a famous restaurant. Her perfectionist and meticulous nature means that she does not accept criticism very well, which causes her boss to force her to go to therapy if she wants to continue maintaining her position as a chef. After the tragic death of her sister in a car accident, Kate is forced to take care of Zoe, her 9-year-old niece who has just been orphaned. Her new family situation causes Kate to face real problems reconciling her work day with taking care of Zoe, so her boss decides to give her a few days of vacation so she can adapt to the changes. After a few days of rest, Kate returns to work with more strength. However, upon her arrival the chef meets Nick Palmer, a chef who likes to take risks and bet on new ideas and who has been hired to replace her in her absence. The restaurant manager is delighted with Nick, so she decides to make him a permanent part of the staff, which will cause Kate to feel threatened. Rivalry will arise between both chefs due to their totally opposite characters and their different ways of working. Little by little, Kate and Nick will transform their rivalry into love, a process in which little Zoe will have a lot to do with.

programme.title: Love without an appointment
programme.desc: Romantic comedy from film director Ben Palmer, who focuses especially on directing television series, including "The Inbetweeners" and "Comedy Lab." Nancy is a thirty-four-year-old woman who spends another day of being hungover, tired of not having a partner and still being single at her age. Her group of friends try to advise her to find someone, but she is not up to the task and does not always listen to them. His parents have had a very different story from his and they enjoy the happiest and most perfect relationship. When Nancy heads through the streets of London on her way to her parents' anniversary, she can't imagine that she will meet someone who will change her destiny forever: Jack. Jack is a forty-year-old divorced man who mistakes her for his blind date, a girl ten years younger than Nancy. She takes advantage of the opportunity presented to her and pretends to be his blind date, thus beginning one of the craziest trips of her life with an unknown man with whom she soon hits it off. Nancy ends up thinking that Jack is the perfect boyfriend for her, but he keeps thinking that he is who he really is not. Lake Bell, the actress who plays Nancy in the film, used a British accent throughout filming, even when they were not filming, so the entire crew assumed that the actress was British and did not find out the truth until the end of filming. The film was shot entirely in the United Kingdom, with the majority of scenes in recording studios.

programme.title: It happened in Manhattan
programme.desc: Not applicable

programme.title: The President and Miss Wade
programme.desc: Andrew Shepherd (Michael Douglas), president of the United States and widower for just over a year, begins a romance with Sydney Wade (Annette Benning), a consultant for an important environmental organization. This relationship, in the middle of the election campaign, will be taken advantage of by Bob Rumson (Richard Dreyfuss), the opposing candidate, to attack the president.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: elite mercenaries
programme.desc: Billionaire technology CEO Donovan Chalmers hires a group of deadly mercenaries to protect a piece of technology that, if exposed, could destroy the world. Their mission becomes even more risky when Chalmers' daughter is kidnapped by the dangerous terrorist group 'The Pardoners', who will stop at nothing to obtain the valuable and dangerous technology.

programme.title: The wanted
programme.desc: Henry Fonda is a priest persecuted by the authorities after the government has banned religion. His decision is to flee to another country, but at the border he will have difficulty getting out and will have to disguise himself. The film, directed by John Ford, is based on a novel by Graham Greene.

programme.title: Mystery at the Florist: A suspicious burial
programme.desc: When a body appears at her cousin's wedding, a former lawyer florist sets out to investigate a crime that hides family secrets and unexpected dangers.

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Point Break (Sin límites)
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'They Call Him Bodhi', directed in 1991 by Kathryn Bigelow ('The Darkest Night'). Johnny, a young FBI agent, infiltrates a team of elite athletes led by Boshi. programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: Red hot
programme.desc: Art Jeffries is an FBI agent with respect problems for his superiors. One day he is assigned to investigate the case of a missing boy, Simon, whose parents have been murdered. After finding him, he discovers that he is a nine-year-old autistic boy with a prodigious ability to reveal supposedly insurmountable government codes.

programme.title: Terrorist threat
programme.desc: Ewan, an agent of the British Secret Service, has the mission to capture and eliminate Ash, a university student turned suicide bomber, as well as the cell to which he belongs.

programme.title: Haute couture
programme.desc: Esther, first seamstress at the House of Dior, works on her latest Haute Couture collection, before retiring. Jade, a 20-year-old girl, steals her purse on the subway. Days later, repentant, she decides to go and return it. Esther decides to offer him a chance.

programme.title: The jury
programme.desc: A young New Orleans widow files a civil lawsuit against a powerful corporate consortium whom she blames for her husband's death. Thus, a multimillion-dollar case is launched. Judicial thriller based on a novel by John Grisham, a best-selling writer who is well versed in all the ins and outs of United States law.

BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: A new Netflix documentary follows the final stage of Rafael Nadal's tennis career. The series is the latest high-profile sports documentary made for a streaming platform. Zachary Heinzerling, director of Rafa, outlines how the film was made and the level of access his team received. Minal Modha, senior research director at Ampere Analysis, provides context on the growing business of sports documentaries. In Scotland, Peter Murrell's guilty plea to embezzling funds from the SNP has renewed attention on the reporting that first raised questions about the affair. John Ferguson, political editor at the Sunday Mail, reflects on his own journalism. Laura Kuenssberg explains how she secured the first broadcast interview with Nicola Sturgeon since her estranged husband's conviction. CBS News is facing upheaval following changes in leadership and the departure of several senior figures. The latest developments centre on the dismissal of veteran correspondent Scott Pelley after public criticism of the network's direction. Michael Grynbaum, media correspondent at The New York Times, outlines the story.

programme.title: Talking Business
programme.desc: As the World Cup kicks off, who is cashing in and who is paying up? 2026 is set to be Fifa’s most lucrative tournament ever, with billions being earned from TV rights and sponsorship deals, as well as controversially high ticket prices. So how do broadcasters and sponsors make their huge investments pay off? Ricardo Fort helps companies advertise at leading sports tournaments and shares his insights from his time as head of sponsorships at Visa and Coca-Cola. And as streaming giant Dazn tries to change the way the world watches live sport, its head of football rights Pete Oliver explains how new technology is changing viewing habits. Also, Ben Thompson hears from leading sports consultant Tony Simpson at Oliver Wyman about how these big tournaments boost economies and can leave a lasting legacy.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Adrienne Murray explores how new 3D imaging is being used to support heart procedures. Harriet Bradshaw finds out how gym equipment is being invented and tested to help astronauts exercise in space. Andrew Rogers chats to the game developers pitching the next big thing at the London Gaming Festival. And Shiona McCallum meets the medical expert testing out the future of prosthetics following his own near-fatal cycling accident.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: China's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The Yellow River - running for almost five and half thousand kilometres from west to east - is known as China's mother river. It's hailed as the cradle of Chinese civilisation and over thousands of years, it has fed billions of people and inspired generations of artists. Alastair explores the Yellow River and discovers some of the finest artwork from its valley, to understand how this unique natural phenomenon is deeply connected with the identity of the Chinese and the roots of their culture.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Myanmar's civil war has claimed almost 100 thousand lives. In 2021, the country's military seized power in a coup - and after losing ground to rebel and ethnic groups, it's making a renewed push - carrying out the forced-recruitment of tens of thousands of conscripts - and employing new drone technology. The United Nations' human rights spokesman has condemned the military's tactics which he's called brutal, and he's said that civilians are paying a terrible price. BBC correspondent, Quentin Sommerville and camera journalist Darren Conway have spent time with rebel groups. This films contains some graphic scenes, including surgery and childbirth.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: The men's football World Cup begins in the US, Mexico and Canada. With matches being played in three different time zones, it presents an unprecedented challenge for the media. Alex Kay-Jelski, director of BBC Sport, Craig Hope, chief football reporter at the Daily Mail, and Daniel Storey, chief football writer at The i, set out their plans. Violent disorder on the streets in Belfast has followed a knife attack, with a Sudanese man who was granted refugee status in the UK in 2023 charged with attempted murder. Dan Johnson, BBC News correspondent, explains the challenge for journalists reporting from the ground. Russia's economic forum in St Petersburg played host to several Western social media stars. Influencers are now part of the messaging strategy for governments around the world. Samantha Berkhead, editor of The Moscow Times, and Evie Aspinall, director of the British Foreign Policy Group, discuss the reasons.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: Eighty years ago, an icon of travel first appeared from a Tuscan assembly line - the Vespa. Qasa Alom takes to Tuscany's roads on a vintage scooter to explore a region whose reputation as a playground for the rich and famous also hides a fascinating blue-collared history. Qasa meets the last few working Tuscan cowboys of Maremma as they gather in their cattle and explain how tourism is now their bread and butter; and he heads to the caves of Carrara to see the dangers and hard work involved in mining some of the most-prized marble in the world.

programme.title: The Climate Question
programme.desc: A global programme that reflects the variety of takes on climate change, how best to understand it and the world's attempts to avert it, temper it or adapt to it. It is not about questioning whether climate change is happening, it's about finding the best ways to respond to it. This is sharp-edged, analytical inquiry. Hard scrutiny, touched with a sense of adventure and discovery, and where we can find it, hope. It includes stories from across the world on why we find it so hard to save our own planet, and how we might change that.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: Not long ago, artificial intelligence was being sold as a science-fiction reality, a force that could transform society, cure disease, and remake the economy. Now, the mood is shifting. The companies driving the boom are racing for investment while grappling with a tougher reality: AI is costly, unpredictable, and not yet profitable. Even some of its creators warn progress may be too fast, as public anxiety grows and political resistance takes shape. Is AI now at a tipping point - caught between financial pressure, technological risk and a rising backlash?

programme.title: Inside Museums
programme.desc: Join cultural historian Janina Ramirez on a journey of discovery to unearth the story behind one of the world's most underrated art forms, the ornate Turkish ceramics known as Iznik tiles. Dizzying and gorgeous in their complexity, the tiles are the standout feature of some of Turkey's most beautiful buildings - and adorn great museums around the world. In the city of Istanbul, Janina heads off the beaten track to the Sadberk Hanım Museum, home of one of the world's finest collections of Iznik ceramics, and to the Rüstem Pasha Mosque, where she sees the art form at its height and learns how to decode its meanings. Heading to Iznik, the town that gave the tiles their name, Janina discovers how the art form was rediscovered after being lost for centuries - and meets an artist taking inspiration from Iznik design to create new forms of ceramics.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programme.desc: John Simpson, in discussion with the BBC's unparalleled range of experts across the world, explores the impact of Israel's recent attacks on Lebanon, analyses the flotation of SpaceX and what it will mean for Elon Musk, and looks at the outcome of the election in Armenia.

programme.desc: Seorang wartawan yang sering membuat marah atasannya karena lambat bekerja dan selalu ketinggalan berita. Setelah menemukan radio antik di Toko Kr. Amat, dia selalu mengetahui semua peristiwa-peristiwa penting.

programme.title: Snow White Van Betawi
programme.desc: Puteri, gadis yang dibuang dan akan dibunuh oleh Ibu tirinya sendiri. Dia akhirnya ditemukan dan dibesarkan oleh seorang jawara betawi yang melatihnya menjadi seorang gadis pesilat handal yang akan menghadapi sang Ibu tiri.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 1
programme.desc: Mada dan Ken, yang sering di hajar oleh Williard seorang juara bertahan MMA. Ketika Ken dihajar habis-habisan oleh Williard hingga masuk rumah sakit, Gajahmada lalu memutuskan untuk belajar silat dan mengalahkan Williard.

programme.title: Prajurit Bantegan
programme.desc: Igo pindah dari kota besar setelah kedua orang tuanya meninggal. Saat mendapat masalah dengan pemilik sanggar bantengan, dia bertemu Ki Sungkur yang menolongnya. Sejak itu dia berguru silat kepada Ki Sungkur.

programme.title: Cintaku Di Kejar Cicilan
programme.desc: Andre adalah pria tampan yang selalu bergaya dengan barang-barang mewah. Namun, semua itu dibeli Andre dengan berutang, akhirnya dia pun dikejar cicilan yang menumpuk.

programme.title: Cinta Di Musim Duren
programme.desc: Ayas tertipu habis-habisan dan mengalami kesulitan keuangan. Untuk membayar hutang, dia menerima tawaran bekerja di kios durian. Vina yang pada awalnya membenci Ayas, merasa iba dan membantunya ikut casting.

programme.title: Putri Langit Cari Jodoh
programme.desc: Anjani, putri khayangan yang diturunkan ke bumi selama 100 hari untuk mencari pemuda sebagai calon suami. Sebelum turun ke bumi, Anjani dibekali kalung yang menjadi sumber kekuatannya. Siapa yang menjadi pilihan sang puteri?

programme.title: Kabayan Mencari Cinta
programme.desc: Sosok legendaris tanah Sunda, Kabayan, kembali hadir. Kali ini, dia bertekad untuk melengkapi kehidupan asmaranya: ia mencari cinta!

programme.title: 7 Pusaka - Sabuk Penghilang Raga
programme.desc: Raga, maling kelas teri yang bernasib sial. Saat dikejar para warga dan bersembunyi di dalam sebuah kali, tiba-tiba Raga menemukan sebuah koin gobang yang hanyut. Saat Raga menggenggam koin itu, tiba-tiba saja ia menghilang.

programme.title: Sunan Gunung Jati Tobatnya Ki Jagabaya
programme.desc: Warga desa sudah membayar upeti kepada Kesultanan Cirebon pimpinan Sunan Gunung Jati, karena mereka tahu upeti tersebut untuk kesejahteraan rakyat. Namun Patih Kerajaan tetap memaksa mereka untuk membayar upeti lagi pada Raja

programme.title: Cinta Ditolak Disko Bertindak
programme.desc: Inilah lika-liku persahabatan Mila dan Zani, dua gadis yang berlawanan pandangan soal ramalan. Tidak hanya kekonyolan, kisah ini juga menghadirkan perjuangan keduanya meraih asmara.

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Dompet
programme.desc: Tak ingin diledek jomblo terus, Kinan berpura-pura menjadi pacar Reno yang tajir, namun Reno hanya memanfaatkan Kinan saja. Ternyata Reno tidak setajir yang Kinan kira.

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat Bantal Mimpi Indah
programme.desc: Marina mendapatkan bantal dari toko KR. Amat. Bantal ini punya khasiat jika digunakan saat tidur maka waktu bisa diputar kembali. Segala sesuatu yang menyangkut masa lalu dapat terulang kembali dan apapun yang diinginkan terwujud

programme.title: Mantan Pacarku Superhero
programme.desc: Seorang mahasiswa yang menyebalkan dan sok jagoan, tiba-tiba mendapatkan pacar yang ternyata benar-benar seorang pahlawan super. Namun sang pacar ternyata luar biasa posesif dan memakai kekuatan supernya untuk meneror mahasiswa.

programme.title: Saat Teduh Bersama Gereja Mawar Sharon
The Adulteress
programme.desc: Pada masa kemunduran Dinasti Ching, putra dari hakim lokal membunuh seorang pedagang keliling dan memperkosa istrinya. Sang istri dijebak atas pembunuhan suaminya oleh sang pemerkosa.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan adalah seorang pemuda cerdas dari keluarga berada. Ia telah mengalahkan semua penduduk di kotanya dan memutuskan untuk menaklukkan Tiga Pemuda Cerdas dari Utara.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: Kisah yang diangkat berdasarkan sebuah opera Tiongkok nan terkenal ini menceritakan seorang sarjana muda nan miskin bernama Zhang yang terpesona oleh Hong, putri dari keluarga berpengaruh yang ia temui di sebuah kuil.

programme.title: All Men Are Brothers
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah patriotik tentang tujuh prajurit dalam kelompok penjahat 108 di Gunung Liang, serta tujuh pertempuran nan luar biasa melawan pejabat pemerintah yang kejam demi menyelamatkan negara mereka.

programme.title: Sons Of Good Earth
programme.desc: Film peraih penghargaan untuk naskah dan penyuntingan terbaik ini menceritakan kisah lain dari Perang Tiongkok-Jepang yang menggambarkan dengan jelas kehidupan masa perang secara artistik dan emosional.

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing dan Huang Rong mengasuh putra saudara angkatnya Yang Kang dan memberinya nama Yang Gou. Demi mencegah Yan Gou membalas dendam atas kematian ayahnya, Huang Rong melarangnya mempelajari seni bela diri.

programme.title: Judgement Of An Assassin
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat merencanakan perselisihan untuk mendominasi dunia seni bela diri. Pembunuh bertopeng mereka membantai klan-klan lain dan salah satu pembunuh ditangkap dan diadili di pengadilan antarklan.

programme.title: Hong Kong 73
programme.desc: Di tahun 1973, bursa saham meroket, namun masalah-masalah sosial di Hong Kong terus memburuk. Bintang-bintang besar TVB dan Shaw Brothers bersatu dalam kisah yang lucu ini.

programme.title: Murderer Pursues
programme.desc: Danny Lee berperan sebagai pria yang dikira sebagai pengungsi dan dibuntuti oleh seorang polisi jujur dalam film kejahatan menarik asal Tiongkok-Vietnam arahan aktor yang kini menjadi sutradara, Wang Chung.

programme.title: Hex
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang sakit parah bekerjasama dengan asisten rumah tangganya untuk membunuh sang suami yang kasar. Namun, hal ini menyebabkan serangkaian kejadian mengerikan.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang setia menguak sebuah jaringan pemerasan dan penipuan setelah suaminya ditipu oleh seorang penari perut yang licik. Saat sang penari ditikam, keadaan pun menjadi semakin tak terkendali.

programme.title: Young Lovers
programme.desc: Seorang anak dari keluarga kaya yang gemar bermain gitar bernama Yang Fan pergi ke Jepang untuk bergabung dengan sebuah band rock. Ia juga berusaha mendapatkan cinta dari dua gadis cantik.

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Kisah legendaris yang bercerita tentang keberanian dan kepahlawanan ini dibintangi oleh Ivy Ling Po yang berperan sebagai Mulan, gadis yang bergabung dengan tentara dan menjadi pahlawan sejati bagi warga Tiongkok.

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Kisah legendaris yang bercerita tentang keberanian dan kepahlawanan ini dibintangi oleh Ivy Ling Po yang berperan sebagai Mulan, gadis yang bergabung dengan tentara dan menjadi pahlawan sejati bagi warga Tiongkok.

programme.title: The Bride From Hell
programme.desc: Idola tahun '70-an, Hsing Hui dan Yon Fan, membintangi film horor yang bercerita tentang pengusaha muda yang menikahi wanita muda nan cantik tanpa menyadari jika sang gadis dirasuki oleh iblis.

programme.title: The Fighting Fool
programme.desc: Meng Yuan-wen akan berhadapan dengan Kuan Feng dalam film saga Wushu yang penuh kehebohan tentang sebuah galah berharga yang memiliki rahasia besar.

programme.title: My Dream Boat
programme.desc: Sebuah film yang berkisah tentang sebuah hubungan cinta nan rumit antara sekelompok anak muda yang terjerat dalam ikatan cinta dan emosi.

programme.title: The Killer Has No Return
programme.desc: Pembunuh profesional Lui pergi ke Malaysia setelah melaksanakan misinya membunuh seorang bos geng besar Hong Kong. Target selanjutnya adalah pengantin pria yang mengadakan pesta pernikahan di sebuah hotel di Pecinan.

programme.title: The Younger Generation
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tragis tentang seorang gadis yang menikah dan memiliki 5 anak. Setelah ia dan sang suami meninggal, salah seorang anaknya terpaksa menjadi PSK untuk menafkahi keempat saudaranya.

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda ahli bela diri merencanakan aksi balas dendam terhadap seorang ninja yang telah membunuh guru dan saudara seperguruannya.

programme.title: Dirty Ho
programme.desc: Wang adalah pangeran ke-11 yang menyamar sebagai ahli barang antik demi menyembunyikan identitas aslinya. Ia merasa menemukan pria yang tepat untuk membantunya saat bertemu seorang penipu cerdas bernama Dirty Ho.

programme.title: Passing Flickers
programme.desc: Kisah nyata tentang industri film Hong Kong yang disutradarai oleh Li Han Hsiang ini menggambarkan saat-saat paling menyenangkan dan paling aktual di suatu era seperti yang dimuat dalam kolom gosip surat kabar.

programme.title: To Kill A Mastermind
programme.desc: Sebuah sindikat kejahatan nan kejam, klan Qi Sha, yang dikendalikan oleh tujuh ketua, meneror Tiongkok. Pengadilan Kekaisaran memerintahkan Menteri Yang untuk menghancurkan mereka dengan mengirimkan mata-mata ke sana.

programme.title: Forbidden Tales Of Two Cities
programme.desc: Urusan asmara dan moral di era modern hanyalah segelintir masalah dari cerita yang berlatarkan Makau ini. Kisah cinta antara empat anak manusia menjadi cerita utama dalam kisah humor ini.

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Lo Wei mengarahkan film romantis yang menampilkan bakat akting Ivy Ling Po nan luar biasa. Film ini bercerita tentang seorang sarjana muda yang diperdaya untuk menikahi seorang putri bangsawan.

programme.title: The Black Tavern
programme.desc: Sebuah penginapan menjadi tempat para penjahat bertemu guna merencanakan kejahatan mereka. Sekelompok penjahat tertarik ke tempat tersebut karena desas-desus tentang sebuah harta berharga yang disembunyikan di sana.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Saat Chang Sun memberikan tumpangan pada Wen Jou yang tengah tersesat, ia langsung jatuh cinta. Namun, Chang harus memperjuangkan cintanya karena kakak Wen, seorang gangster bernama Wen Chiang, tidak menyukainya.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Saat Chang Sun memberikan tumpangan pada Wen Jou yang tengah tersesat, ia langsung jatuh cinta. Namun, Chang harus memperjuangkan cintanya karena kakak Wen, seorang gangster bernama Wen Chiang, tidak menyukainya.

programme.title: That Man In Chang-An
programme.desc: Kaisar Han meninggal dan Permaisuri Lu merebut alih kekuasaan. Ia merencanakan untuk membunuh pewaris takhta, Liu Heng. Namun, prajurit bertopeng mengetahui rencana jahatnya dan memberi tahu Liu.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: Sebagai hukuman atas perilaku buruknya, putri Kaisar Jade yang ke-tujuh diusir dari surga dan dikirim untuk tinggal bersama manusia. Di sana, ia jatuh cinta dengan seorang pemuda desa bernama Dong Young.

programme.title: Trilogy Of Swordsmanship
programme.desc: Film antologi kung fu tentang seorang pria yang mempermalukan dirinya sendiri, seorang PSK yang jatuh cinta dengan seorang jenderal dan sekelompok bandit yang berencana menyelamatkan seorang teman dari eksekusi.

programme.title: Oath Of Death
programme.desc: Tiga pendukung setia Sung bekerja sama untuk melawan para penjajah Tartar. Ma melepaskan putri dari penjajah Tartar yang diculik dalam sebuah upaya strategis untuk melawan para penjajah.

programme.title: The Magnificent Concubine
programme.desc: Kaisar tergila-gila pada Yang Gui Fei, selir kesayangannya, sehingga ia menyerahkan pemerintahan negara kepada Perdana Menteri. Namun, Perdana Menteri yang korup, membuat rakyat memberontak.

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: Tersebar kabar jika Ku yang buta menyimpan rahasia Telapak Tangan Buddha. Ia pun diserbu dari berbagai pihak seperti burung-burung raksasa nan mengerikan dan kelompok-kelompok pendekar bela diri.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: Ling Yun berperan sebagai pemain pengganti yang disewa oleh sebuah band populer setelah pemain drum mereka yang egois mengundurkan diri untuk bergabung dengan band saingan mereka.

programme.title: Godfather Of Canton
programme.desc: Seorang komisaris ditangkap oleh utusan Cheng atas tuduhan korupsi dengan bantuan yang tak disengaja dari Lin. Saat bekerja untuk Cheng, Lin akhirnya mengetahui cara memperoleh uang suap dari Chang.

programme.title: Hong Kong Rhapsody
programme.desc: Hong Kong Rhapsody adalah film musikal yang penuh dengan lagu dan tarian. Peter Chen-Ho berperan sebagai pesulap playboy yang mengubah cara hidupnya setelah menjadi penjaga seorang penyanyi muda.

programme.title: Portrait In Crystal
programme.desc: Di film fantasi seni bela diri ini, jenderal Teng Wei Hao curiga bahwa sebuah lukisan kristal telah dikutuk dan menyebabkan beberapa pembunuhan. Ia mengutus anak buahnya untuk menyelidiki pencipta lukisan itu.

programme.title: A Friend From Inner Space
programme.desc: Shek Kin, yang biasa berperan sebagai tokoh jahat, mengambil peran langka di film komedi tentang hantu lucu yang berteman dengan seorang anak lelaki dan membantu sang anak menyatukan kembali orangtuanya yang berseteru.

programme.title: Let's Fall In Love
programme.desc: Film komedi romantis yang dibintangi artis legendaris Lin Feng Jiao ini menceritakan kisah cinta yang tak biasa antara putra seorang pengusaha dan keponakan perempuan dari seorang kepala sekolah taman kanak-kanak.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Setelah membunuh seekor harimau, Wu Sung mendapat kenaikan jabatan, namun ia malah terjebak dalam cinta segitiga yang tragis antara saudaranya yang buruk rupa dan istri saudaranya yang mencoba untuk menggodanya.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: Seorang pria tunanetra, You Ji Ren, bekerja di sebuah pabrik di pulau terpencil. Karena badai, pabrik itu terisolasi dan muncul sesosok monster yang membuat siapa pun berubah menjadi bayangan hitam jika melihatnya.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: Kisah ini berlatar di Shanghai pada akhir masa Dinasti Qing, dan bercerita tentang seorang pemuda bernama Chen Zhen yang menjadi seorang pahlawan nasional usai menanggung kesulitan dan mengatasi tantangan dalam hidup.

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: Seorang biksu ulung berusaha melindungi seorang dokter muda yang naif dari iblis ular berusia seribu tahun. Pertarungan kekuatan psikis berujung pada kekacauan.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Pergantian rezim di Leka memicu konflik di dunia hitam & putih. Polisi mengirim Zheng Zha menyusup ke geng Song Bang, tanpa tahu pihak lain sudah siap membalas dendam.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: Petualangan bersejarah nan epik berlatar masa-masa penuh gejolak di masa Tiga Kerajaan. Cao Cao berusaha untuk memasukkan Guan Yu ke dalam pasukannya, tapi Guan tetap setia pada Liu Bei, yang merupakan musuh Cao.

programme.title: Out Of The Dark
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tua tewas setelah terjatuh dari sebuah gedung dan arwahnya menghantui tempat tersebut. Merasa ketakutan, para penjaga keamanan setempat pun meminta bantuan Leo si pemburu hantu beserta asistennya.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Seorang pengawal kekaisaran dan tiga teman masa kecilnya yang pengkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: Kepala keluarga kaya meninggal dunia dan dalam wasiatnya mewariskan kekayaannya kepada putrinya. Putranya marah dan menggunakan seorang pengumpul sampah yang mirip dengan saudara perempuannya untuk mencuri kekayaan tersebut. Putra paman juga menginginkan bagian dari kekayaan itu dan memaksa seorang pencuri kecil untuk mencuri wasiat tersebut demi rencana jahatnya.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: Dunia berada dalam kekacauan setelah pohon kehidupan dibakar. Sun Wu Kong pun memutuskan untuk kembali ke masa lalu guna menghidupkannya kembali, tetapi kekuatannya tak stabil usai dirinya kehilangan ikat kepala emas.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: Sebuah film fantasi-horor berlatar belakang Moskow masa kini, di mana masing-masing kekuatan yang mengendalikan siang dan malam saling bertempur.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Gangster kejam Guts melakukan perampokan berlian, lalu meminta bantuan anggota triad lama, Fei, untuk mengatur pembeli. Namun ketika Guts mengkhianati pembeli, Fei malah mendapatkan berlian tersebut, dan dicari oleh polisi serta Guts.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Nona Qiao meninggal secara tak wajar dan kepala pelayannya membayar seorang perajin untuk membuat sebuah boneka kertas. Serangkaian peristiwa nan mengerikan terjadi saat arwah Nona Qiao bangkit untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: Sebuah kartel narkoba menduduki wilayah Dong Zhou. Mei Jing dari Unit Komando Wanita Thunderbolt memimpin timnya untuk menyerang markas mereka. Namun, Mei dan timnya disergap dan identitas ayah Mei terungkap.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: Sebuah kartel narkoba menduduki wilayah Dong Zhou. Mei Jing dari Unit Komando Wanita Thunderbolt memimpin timnya untuk menyerang markas mereka. Namun, Mei dan timnya disergap dan identitas ayah Mei terungkap.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Raja Kera bereinkarnasi dalam wujud bukan manusia sebagai Joker, seorang perampok jalanan yang tidak menyadari identitas aslinya dan fakta bahwa 500 tahun sebelumnya, dia dan tuannya, Biksu Panjang Umur, dihukum dan dipaksa untuk tetap menjadi manusia.

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. B, yang memiliki nama lengkap Benjamin Barker, adalah seorang pegawai kantoran yang menjalani kehidupan monoton. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah insiden aneh di laboratorium ilmiah tempat temannya bekerja, Mr. B terpapar dengan zat misterius yang memberinya kemampuan untuk terbang. Awalnya, dia merasa bingung dan takut, tetapi segera dia mulai mengeksplorasi kekuatan barunya dengan penuh semangat.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang wanita berusia akhir dua puluhan yang menemukan kembali bakatnya dalam bertinju setelah lama absen. Secara tak terduga, ia bertemu dengan mantan pelatih tinjunya dan keduanya bekerja sama untuk membantunya mencapai babak final pertandingan tinju profesional.

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: Anita Yuan Yung-yi berperan sebagai seorang anak perempuan yang tidak sengaja menemukan sebuah mutiara dengan jin di dalamnya. Michael Wong berperan sebagai jin yang mengabulkan tiga permintaannya.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: Putra dari keluarga kaya jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita yang hanya akan menikahinya setelah ia menjadi seorang Guru Kung-Fu. Dalam 'Drama Komedi' ini, ia menjadi pahlawan legendaris dengan berusaha menyelamatkan kaisar, dalam pencarian cintanya yang sebenarnya.

programme.title: The Monkey Is Back
programme.desc: Monyet Batu, memberikan harapan kepada seorang gadis kecil nan putus asa. Namun, Monyet Batu dikalahkan dalam pertempuran melawan Dewa Perang bermata tiga, yang membuatnya kehilangan kekuatan dan jatuh ke dunia fana.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: Fight Back To School 2
programme.desc: Sing mengundurkan diri dari kepolisian setelah diturunkan pangkatnya ke bagian pengaturan lalu lintas, sementara rekannya ditugaskan dalam misi yang melibatkan teroris asing yang mengancam akan mengebom sebuah sekolah di Hong Kong, sehingga Sing memutuskan untuk membantu dengan menyamar di sekolah yang sama.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi akan mewarisi kekayaan kakeknya yang tengah sekarat dengan satu syarat, yaitu ia harus menikah dalam waktu sebulan. Jika tidak, warisan tersebut akan diberikan kepada sang paman yang bernama Robert.

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Sahabat baik Bodil dan Isabel, yang tampaknya telah menikah dengan bahagia, menyelinap pergi untuk melakukan perselingkuhan rahasia dengan menggunakan satu sama lain sebagai alibi. Namun, ketika Isabel terbunuh saat mereka seharusnya bersama. Bodil terjebak dalam jaringan kebohongannya sendiri.

programme.title: She Is In Danger
programme.desc: Xue menemukan bahwa Yi dan temannya telah membunuh mantan kekasih Yi, dan ia dikurung oleh keduanya untuk menutupi pembunuhan tersebut. Lalu, teman Xue, Wen, datang mencarinya. Bisakah mereka lolos dari bahaya?

programme.title: She Is In Danger
programme.desc: Xue menemukan bahwa Yi dan temannya telah membunuh mantan kekasih Yi, dan ia dikurung oleh keduanya untuk menutupi pembunuhan tersebut. Lalu, teman Xue, Wen, datang mencarinya. Bisakah mereka lolos dari bahaya?

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: Wong Fei-Hung adalah seorang pemuda yang nakal namun saleh, tetapi setelah serangkaian insiden, ayahnya yang frustrasi menyuruh seorang guru bela diri mabuk untuk mendisiplinkannya.

programme.title: Loving You
programme.desc: Seorang polisi yang pemarah dan suka main perempuan ditembak di kepala saat memburu seorang pengedar narkoba. Selama proses pemulihan, ia merenungkan kembali hidupnya dan berusaha memperbaiki pernikahannya yang hancur.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: VR Fighter

programme.desc: Dicari oleh mafia Tiongkok, seorang kurir sepeda di Kota New York melarikan diri ke dunia parkour setelah bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik yang tak dikenalnya.

programme.title: Franklyn
programme.desc: Berlatar di dunia paralel antara London kontemporer dan Meanwhile City nan futuristik, 'Franklyn' memaparkan kisah tentang empat orang kehilangan arah yang hidupnya dipertemukan oleh nasib, asmara dan tragedi.

programme.title: Death Squad
programme.desc: Ketika semua jalur komunikasi terputus dengan sebuah fasilitas penelitian ilmiah rahasia yang berlokasi di bekas laboratorium biokimia Uni Soviet, sebuah perusahaan militer swasta dibentuk untuk memasuki fasilitas tersebut guna mencari dan mengevakuasi dokter kepala.

programme.title: Daughter Of The Wolf
programme.desc: Seorang veteran militer memburu orang-orang yang menculik putranya.

programme.title: Deadly Vendetta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; namun, segera terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya

programme.title: 2012: Supernova
programme.desc: Seorang ilmuwan berlomba melawan waktu untuk memasang perisai di antara Bumi dan gelombang ledakan supernova yang mendekat. Di sisi lain, sekte kiamat berusaha menyabotase proyek tersebut dengan keyakinan bahwa hal itu merupakan “kehendak Tuhan” dan membiarkan penduduk Bumi dilalap oleh radiasi intens dari gelombang tersebut.

programme.title: Every Last One Of Them
programme.desc: Seorang pria mencari putrinya yang hilang, tetapi pencariannya mengungkap konspirasi yang lebih besar yang melibatkan Chinatown-menggagalkan kesepakatan kapitalisme besar atas hak atas air.

programme.title: Shrapnel

programme.desc: Pada tahun 1874 di Texas, dua teman dan seorang pengintai India menyelamatkan wanita yang diculik dari pedagang sadis di dekat perbatasan Meksiko.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: Horizon Line
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri yang terbang dengan pesawat kecil untuk menghadiri pernikahan di pulau tropis harus berjuang untuk hidup mereka setelah pilot mereka menderita serangan jantung.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: The Ash Lad In The Hall Of...
The End Of The Tour
programme.desc: Kisah wawancara lima hari antara reporter Rolling Stone David Lipsky dan novelis terkenal David Foster Wallace, yang terjadi tepat setelah penerbitan novel epik inovatif Wallace, 'Infinite Jest', pada tahun 1996.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari supermodel Cindy Crawford meliputi berolahraga, makan siang bersama Helena Christensen, dan menyalakan lampu di Empire State Building.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: Seorang ahli kunci dibebaskan dari penjara dan ditarik kembali ke dunia polisi yang korup dan gangster kota kecil, terlepas dari masa depan yang ia harapkan untuk dibangun bersama mantan tunangannya, seorang detektif, dan putri mereka.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: Iron Fist: Rebellion
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dianugerahi kemampuan bela diri yang luar biasa serta kekuatan mistis yang dikenal sebagai Iron Fist.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Christmas In Scotland
programme.desc: Dalam perjalanan ke Skotlandia, seorang desainer instalasi mendapati dirinya membantu sebuah komunitas kecil menciptakan tampilan lampu meriah, meskipun ada campur tangan dari seorang pewaris kaya. Terpaksa bekerja sama, mereka bersatu untuk menghadirkan keajaiban musiman melalui cahaya.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Bidadari Pulau Hantu

programme.title: Rumah Hantu Pasar Malam

programme.title: Lutung Kasarung

programme.title: Josie's Taste Of The Westcountry
programme.desc: Proud Bristolian Josie Gibson takes us on a tour of her beloved West Country in a journey of celebration to discover dinner delights, freshly-caught lunches, the best of passionate artisan makers and growers and a few hidden gems to surprise us all - in this episode, Josie gets acquainted with the Cornish sea with a coasteering jump, meets passionate dairy farmers, picks fruit for chef Paul Ainsworth to make a delicious strawberry trifle and catches her own lobster for a scenic BBQ on the beach.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot travels to Letterkenny in Donegal, often called Ireland's 'forgotten county', but quickly discovers a place full of unforgettable people, stories and food. Surrounded by ancient rainforest, he heads into the woods to forage for prized golden chanterelle mushrooms before visiting the renowned Lemon Tree Restaurant, where he learns to make tortellini completely from scratch with one of Donegal's most skilled chefs. Dermot also meets Abdul, a Syrian refugee-turned-honey farmer, who teaches him how to extract honey from the hive and shares traditions from home, including how Syrians enjoy honey with strong coffee and a sweet dish called knaffe. Along the way, Dermot uncovers a county quietly building one of Ireland's most exciting food scenes, shaped by resilience, creativity and a deep connection to the land.

programme.title: Dr. No
programme.desc: Spy thriller film starring Sean Connery and Ursula Andress, 1962. In the first James Bond movie, an MI6 agent is sent to Jamaica to investigate the death of a fellow British agent.Bond follows the sinister trail of Dr. No whose goal is world dominationSean Connery is on scene-stealing form in the film that spawned the rest

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours
programme.desc: Ainsley rustles up recipes packed with vibrant flavours and citrusy kicks that'll put a real spring in your step! With plenty of zing and a little bit of magic in every bite, Ainsley makes a Thai-style salad and serves up a special fish dish for classical musician Alexis Ffrench. JB Gill also joins him for a lesson in making the perfect fruit pavlova.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James is back in the kitchen and cooking for Kelvin and Liz Fletcher, who talk about life on Fletchers' Family Farm, while also tasting some mouth-watering recipes from chefs Chantelle Nicholson, Andres Alemany, and Paul Foster.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot heads to the wild west of Donegal to explore the county's Irish-speaking Gaeltacht, where the people, music and food are anything but ordinary. After a crash course at Glencolmcille Folk Village - a living museum celebrating old Irish traditions - Dermot bravely puts his Irish to the test ordering a pint in the local pub. He also discovers an old Irish cure-all: carrageen moss pudding, a surprisingly delicious seaweed dessert said to keep everything from colds to heartbreak at bay. Down the road in the fishing town of Killybegs, Dermot gets hands-on with the Molloy family, learning how to fillet monkfish like a pro. He then meets the Shine family, who produce beautifully crafted tinned fish using rare seasonal catches from the Atlantic. Over an unforgettable 'seacuterie' feast, Dermot discovers why Donegal's seafood scene is making serious waves.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is leaving for Spain with baby James and says an awkward goodbye to Martin - the Doc goes back to his consultation room, but he is distracted and walks out before going to find Ruth, who tells him that all his problems stem from his childhood because his parents never showed him any love and that he has the propensity to change. As Bert and Jennifer's engagement party goes off with a bang due to a faulty generator that comes as a shock to DJ Caroline - and Al pitches his vision for Ruth's farmhouse to become a bed and breakfast to her - Martin tries to book a flight to Spain to get Louisa back. While on hold, the Doc sorts through his mail and finds a scan of Louisa's brain - when he spots a malformation, he knows that the pressure in an aeroplane could trigger it to bleed and that Louisa has recently taken anticoagulants. If the malformation were to bleed, Louisa would be at risk of suffering a brain haemorrhage...

Meanwhile, Al is fretting about his half-decorated B and B while Steve Baker, the man supposed to be helping, is busy organising a lifeboat exercise - when the time for the exercise comes round, the mock rescue becomes all too real and Martin is out at sea as the time for his first therapy session approaches.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean stars in the drama series set during the Napoleonic Wars of 19th-century Spain and based on Bernard Cornwell's best-selling novels. The Franco-Spanish frontier, 1813 - a carriage travelling through the Spanish countryside is ambushed by French soldiers and a young nun flees in terror... however, when the soldiers are themselves attacked by the English later on, a French colonel kills his captain.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. June 1813 - the South Essex is seriously short of men, and when the Duke of Wellington is told that there are no recruits available, he sends Sharpe to England to investigate. When Sharpe and Harper arrive, they are informed that there are 700 men waiting for them in Chelmsford - however, Sharpe finds the barracks deserted with no sign of his missing regiment. He and Harper decide to assume other identities and enlist - recruited by Sergeant Havercamp, Sharpe and Harper arrive at a training camp near the estate of Sir Henry Simmerson where they are trained mercilessly. Sharpe discovers that the new recruits are being auctioned to other regiments and returns to the Horse Guards with this information to entrust it to an old friend called Lawford... but Lawford wants to avoid a scandal and promptly tells Lord Fenner, who tries to have Sharpe killed. With the help of Fenner's mistress Lady Anne, Sharpe must now find the proof to implicate Fenner.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Winter 1813 - Wellington is informed by the debonair Comte de Maquerre that Bordeaux is ready to rebel against Napoleon, but Wellington's spymaster Ross is suspicious and tests Maquerre by suggesting that they use Maquerre's own castle as a base. Maquerre reluctantly agrees but says that the castle is in Napoleon's hands, so Wellington appoints Colonel Bampfylde to lead the attack on the castle with Sharpe in support. Bampfylde, who is intent on glory, sends Sharpe on a scouting mission and tries to capture the castle on his own, but he fails and casualties are heavy - Sharpe, who is a witness to the carnage, therefore has Harris and Frederickson sneak into the castle in disguise, and they soon force the French to surrender once inside. Ashamed by Sharpe's victory, Bampfylde sends him off on a reconnaissance mission - however, Sharpe soon discovers that Bordeaux has no intention of rising against Napoleon and that Maquerre is a double agent.

programme.desc: Lois Maxwell, who played Miss Moneypenny to Roger Moore's James Bond, and Doctor Who star William Troughton make guest appearances as freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case involving action and intrigue. The Saint visits Venice to save a damsel in distress, but he then finds himself plunged headlong into a seedy underworld of gangsters, intrigue, and deadly revenge.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor whose life is disrupted when his brother and young nephew move in with him. Charlie discovers that Alan has been seeing his ex-wife.
